zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Birmingham於1374年出生在愛爾蘭萊音斯特時，她的父親Sir James Birmingham Knight24歲，母親Alice20歲。她於1399年與Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1470年在愛爾蘭迪 本 米亞斯享年96歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Birmingham于1374年出生在爱尔兰萊音斯特时，她的父亲Sir James Birmingham Knight24岁，母亲Alice20岁。她于1399年与Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1470年在爱尔兰迪 本 米亞斯享年96岁。

nameMeanings.name: Birmingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Birmingham in the West Midlands. In Domesday Book the name is already found as Bermingeham, but it seems likely that it was originally Beornmundingahām ‘homestead (Old English hām) of the people of (-inga-) Beornmund’, a personal name composed of the elements beorn ‘young man, warrior’ + mund ‘protection’. This surname is established in Ireland (see Bermingham ).

variants.name: Burningham
meanings: English (Surrey and Hampshire): variant of   Birmingham  .

variants.name: Bermingham
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Sinead.
Irish (of English origin): variant of   Birmingham  . This form of the surname is found mainly in Ireland.

History: The Bermingham family take their surname from lands held at what is now a great city in the West Midlands of England, but it was brought to Ireland as early as the 12th century. The Norman baron Robert de Bermyngeham was a follower of Strongbow (see Clare ); his name is found on a number of Irish charters between 1175 and 1179. The family was also known as Mac Fheorais (see Corish ) in Ireland, named for Piers (Gaelic Feoras) de Bermyngeham, the father of Robert.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Birmingham was born in 1374, in Leinster, Ireland, her father, Sir James Birmingham Knight, was 24 and her mother, Alice, was 20. She married Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon in 1399, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1470, in Diocese of Meath, Ireland, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Birmingham est née en 1374, à Leinster, Irlande, son père, Sir James Birmingham Knight, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon en 1399, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1470, à Diocese of Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 96 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Birmingham 1374 in Leinster, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir James Birmingham Knight 24 und ihre Mutter Alice 20. Sie hat 1399 in Irland Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1470 im Alter von 96 Jahren in Diocese of Meath, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Birmingham è nata il nel 1374 nel Leinster, Irlanda, sua padre, Sir James Birmingham Knight, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Alice, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon nel 1399, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1470, nel Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 96 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Birminghamが1374年にアイルランドレインスターで生まれた時，父Sir James Birmingham Knightは24歳，母Aliceは20歳であった。1399年にアイルランドでSir Robert D'Arcy Dillonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1470年にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ メアスで96歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Birmingham(이)가 1374년 아일랜드 레인스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Birmingham Knight(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1399년 아일랜드에서 Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 아일랜드 디오스스 프 미스에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Birmingham nasceu em 1374, em Leinster, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir James Birmingham Knight, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon em 1399, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1470, em Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, com 96 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Birmingham родилась в 1374 г. в местности линстир, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Sir James Birmingham Knight было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon в 1399 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1470 г. в местности диосес оф мит, Ирландия в возрасте 96 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Birmingham nació en 1374, en Leinster, Irlanda, su papá, Sir James Birmingham Knight, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alice, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Robert D'Arcy Dillon en 1399, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1470, en Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 96 años.
